allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('communes:', d['communes'], '| connaissances:', d['connaissances'], '| procedures:', d['procedures']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([p for p in d['paths'].keys\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in d['paths'].keys\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK -', d['communes'], 'communes,', d['connaissances'], 'fiches'\)")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host '\\''done'\\''')
